description: PlatyPal Bicep Helper Modules catalog. Used by the dynamic Bicep builder to discover available modules, their parameters, outputs, template relevance, and dependency rules.

modules.name: API Management
modules.description: Deploys an Azure API Management instance with optional products and settings via AVM.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: UTC timestamp for unique deployment names.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Azure region. Defaults to resource group location.

parameters.name: keyVaultName
parameters.description: Name of the Key Vault for APIM secrets.

parameters.name: APIManagementService
parameters.description: APIM configuration (name, tier, publisherEmail, publisherName).

parameters.name: products
parameters.description: Array of APIM products to create.

configurableProperties.name: tier
configurableProperties.description: The pricing tier. Developer is recommended for non-production.

configurableProperties.name: publisherEmail
configurableProperties.description: Email address for the API Management publisher.

configurableProperties.name: publisherName
configurableProperties.description: Name of the API Management publisher.

modules.name: API Management Settings
modules.description: Configures an existing APIM instance with product-level settings and policy fragments.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: UTC timestamp for unique deployment names.

parameters.name: apimName
parameters.description: Name of the existing APIM instance.

parameters.name: products
parameters.description: Array of APIM products with subscriptions and settings.

parameters.name: policyFragments
parameters.description: Array of reusable policy fragments to add to APIM.

modules.name: App Service Plan (Logic Apps)
modules.description: Deploys an App Service Plan (server farm) for hosting Logic Apps Standard. Uses Workflow Standard (WS) SKUs.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: UTC timestamp for unique deployment names.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Azure region. Defaults to resource group location.

parameters.name: appServicePlanSettings
parameters.description: Plan config (name, skuName, skuCapacity, maximumScaleBurst, elasticScaleEnabled).

configurableProperties.name: skuName
configurableProperties.description: The pricing tier for Logic Apps. WS (Workflow Standard) SKUs are recommended.

configurableProperties.name: skuCapacity
configurableProperties.description: Number of instances (workers).

configurableProperties.name: elasticScaleEnabled
configurableProperties.description: Enable elastic scale-out for the plan.

configurableProperties.name: maximumScaleBurst
configurableProperties.description: Maximum number of workers when elastic scale is enabled.

modules.name: App Service Plan (Function Apps)
modules.description: Deploys a separate App Service Plan (server farm) for hosting Function Apps. Uses Elastic Premium (EP) SKUs. Only needed when Function Apps should NOT share the Logic Apps plan.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: UTC timestamp for unique deployment names.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Azure region. Defaults to resource group location.

parameters.name: appServicePlanSettings
parameters.description: Plan config (name, skuName, skuCapacity, maximumScaleBurst, elasticScaleEnabled).

configurableProperties.name: skuName
configurableProperties.description: The pricing tier for Function Apps.

configurableProperties.name: skuCapacity
configurableProperties.description: Number of instances (workers).

configurableProperties.name: elasticScaleEnabled
configurableProperties.description: Enable elastic scale-out for the plan.

configurableProperties.name: maximumScaleBurst
configurableProperties.description: Maximum number of workers when elastic scale is enabled.

modules.name: Application Insights
modules.description: Deploys a standalone Application Insights component linked to a Log Analytics workspace.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: UTC timestamp for unique deployment names.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Azure region.

parameters.name: applicationInsightsSettings
parameters.description: App Insights config (name, logAnalyticsWorkspaceResourceId).

modules.name: Log Analytics Workspace
modules.description: Deploys a Log Analytics Workspace for centralized logging.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: UTC timestamp for unique deployment names.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Azure region.

parameters.name: logAnalyticsSettings
parameters.description: Log Analytics config (name, retentionInDays, skuName).

configurableProperties.name: skuName
configurableProperties.description: Pricing tier for Log Analytics.

configurableProperties.name: retentionInDays
configurableProperties.description: Number of days to retain data.

modules.name: Application Insights + Diagnostics (Full)
modules.description: Deploys Log Analytics, Application Insights, APIM logger, and diagnostic settings for full observability.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: UTC timestamp for unique deployment names.

parameters.name: applicationInsightsSettings
parameters.description: Application Insights config (applicationInsightsName, logAnalyticsName, apiManagementServiceName, serviceBusNamespaceName, servicesBusSku, storageAccountName).

modules.name: Nodinite Logging
modules.description: Deploys full Nodinite logging infrastructure: Event Hub, storage, managed identity, RBAC, and APIM policy fragments.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: UTC timestamp for unique deployment names.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Azure region.

parameters.name: NodiniteLoggingSettings
parameters.description: Nodinite logging config (storage, event hub, blob containers).

parameters.name: APIMSettings
parameters.description: APIM settings for policy fragment injection.

parameters.name: environmentSuffix
parameters.description: Environment identifier (dev/test/prod).

modules.name: Container App Environment
modules.description: Deploys a managed Container App Environment with optional VNet and Log Analytics.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: UTC timestamp for unique deployment names.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Azure region.

parameters.name: containerAppEnvironmentSettings
parameters.description: Environment config (name, logAnalyticsWorkspaceResourceId, internal, infrastructureSubnetId).

configurableProperties.name: internal
configurableProperties.description: When true, the environment has no public ingress.

configurableProperties.name: zoneRedundant
configurableProperties.description: Enable zone redundancy for high availability.

modules.name: Service Bus Namespace
modules.description: Deploys a Service Bus Namespace with optional queues and topics via AVM.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: UTC timestamp for unique deployment names.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Azure region.

parameters.name: serviceBusSettings
parameters.description: Service Bus config (name, sku, queues, topics).

configurableProperties.name: sku
configurableProperties.description: Pricing tier for the Service Bus Namespace.

modules.name: Event Hub Namespace
modules.description: Deploys an Event Hub Namespace via AVM.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: UTC timestamp for unique deployment names.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Azure region.

parameters.name: eventHubNamespaceName
parameters.description: Globally unique name of the Event Hub Namespace.

parameters.name: skuName
parameters.description: SKU tier (Basic, Standard, Premium). Defaults to Standard.

configurableProperties.name: skuName
configurableProperties.description: Pricing tier for the Event Hub Namespace.

modules.name: Data Factory
modules.description: Deploys an Azure Data Factory instance via AVM.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: UTC timestamp for unique deployment names.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Azure region.

parameters.name: dataFactoryName
parameters.description: Name of the Data Factory instance.

modules.name: Key Vault
modules.description: Deploys a Key Vault with RBAC authorization and optional secret seeding.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: UTC timestamp for unique deployment names.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Azure region.

parameters.name: keyVaultSettings
parameters.description: Key Vault config (name, skuFamily, enableSoftDelete, enablePurgeProtection, secrets).

configurableProperties.name: skuFamily
configurableProperties.description: Key Vault pricing tier.

configurableProperties.name: enablePurgeProtection
configurableProperties.description: Enable purge protection (recommended for production).

modules.name: Storage Account
modules.description: Deploys a Storage Account with optional blob containers.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: UTC timestamp for unique deployment names.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Azure region.

parameters.name: storageAccountParams
parameters.description: Storage config (name, skuName, accessTier, isHnsEnabled, isSftpEnabled, allowBlobPublicAccess, allowSharedKeyAccess, networkDefaultAction, blobContainers).

configurableProperties.name: skuName
configurableProperties.description: Storage account replication strategy.

configurableProperties.name: accessTier
configurableProperties.description: Blob storage access tier.

configurableProperties.name: isHnsEnabled
configurableProperties.description: Enable hierarchical namespace for Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2.

configurableProperties.name: isSftpEnabled
configurableProperties.description: Enable SSH File Transfer Protocol access. Requires Data Lake Gen2.

configurableProperties.name: allowBlobPublicAccess
configurableProperties.description: Allow anonymous public read access to blob data.

configurableProperties.name: allowSharedKeyAccess
configurableProperties.description: Allow access via storage account keys. Disable to enforce Entra ID authentication only.

configurableProperties.name: networkDefaultAction
configurableProperties.description: Default network access rule. Set to 'Deny' for production to restrict access to allowed networks only.

modules.name: Nodinite Storage Account
modules.description: Deploys a Storage Account with blob containers specifically for Nodinite logging.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: UTC timestamp for unique deployment names.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Azure region.

parameters.name: storageAccountName
parameters.description: Name of the Nodinite storage account.

parameters.name: blobContainers
parameters.description: Array of blob containers to create.

modules.name: Logic App Standard
modules.description: Deploys a Logic App (Standard) with conditional Nodinite and/or App Insights logging.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: UTC timestamp for unique deployment names.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Azure region.

parameters.name: logicAppName
parameters.description: Name of the Logic App.

parameters.name: sharedResources
parameters.description: Shared infrastructure references (appServicePlanId, keyVaultName, etc.).

parameters.name: storageAccountName
parameters.description: Name of the Logic App storage account.

parameters.name: NodiniteLoggingEnabled
parameters.description: Whether Nodinite logging is enabled (true/false).

parameters.name: ApplicationInsightsLoggingEnabled
parameters.description: Whether App Insights logging is enabled (true/false).

configurableProperties.name: hostingModel
configurableProperties.description: Choose where to host the Logic App. 'Azure' uses Azure App Service. 'Azure Arc' deploys to an Arc-enabled Kubernetes cluster for on-premises or multi-cloud hosting.

configurableProperties.name: customLocationResourceId
configurableProperties.description: Format: /subscriptions/{sub}/resourceGroups/{rg}/providers/Microsoft.ExtendedLocation/customLocations/{name}. Leave empty to fill in the generated Bicep later.
configurableProperties.infoMessage: Azure Arc hosting requires: (1) An Arc-enabled Kubernetes cluster, (2) The App Service extension installed on the cluster, (3) A Custom Location created on the cluster, (4) A Kubernetes App Service environment. If these are not set up yet, leave the resource IDs empty and update the generated Bicep files later.

configurableProperties.name: arcAppServicePlanResourceId
configurableProperties.displayName: Arc App Service Plan Resource ID
configurableProperties.description: The resource ID of the App Service Plan running on your Arc-enabled Kubernetes cluster. This replaces the Azure-hosted App Service Plan. Leave empty to fill in the generated Bicep later.

modules.name: Function App
modules.description: Deploys a Function App with conditional Nodinite and/or Application Insights logging.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: UTC timestamp for unique deployment names.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Azure region.

parameters.name: functionAppName
parameters.description: Name of the Function App.

parameters.name: sharedResources
parameters.description: Shared infrastructure references (appServicePlanId, keyVaultName, etc.).

parameters.name: NodiniteLoggingEnabled
parameters.description: Whether Nodinite logging is enabled (true/false).

parameters.name: ApplicationInsightsLoggingEnabled
parameters.description: Whether App Insights logging is enabled (true/false).

modules.name: Container App
modules.description: Deploys an Azure Container App with configurable containers, scaling, and ingress.

parameters.name: dateTime

parameters.name: location

parameters.name: containerAppSettings
parameters.description: Container App config (name, environmentResourceId, containers, ingress, scaleRules).

modules.name: Cosmos DB
modules.description: Deploys a Cosmos DB account with optional SQL databases and containers.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: UTC timestamp for unique deployment names.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Azure region.

parameters.name: cosmosDbSettings
parameters.description: Cosmos DB config (name, defaultConsistencyLevel, capacityMode, sqlDatabases).

configurableProperties.name: defaultConsistencyLevel
configurableProperties.description: Default consistency level for the Cosmos DB account.

configurableProperties.name: capacityMode
configurableProperties.description: Serverless is cost-effective for low-traffic workloads.

modules.name: SQL Server
modules.description: Deploys an Azure SQL logical server with optional databases and Entra admin.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: UTC timestamp for unique deployment names.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Azure region.

parameters.name: sqlServerSettings
parameters.description: SQL config (name, administratorLogin, entraAdministrator, firewallRules, databases).

modules.name: Redis Cache
modules.description: Deploys an Azure Cache for Redis with configurable SKU and TLS settings.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: UTC timestamp for unique deployment names.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Azure region.

parameters.name: redisCacheSettings
parameters.description: Redis config (name, skuName, capacity, enableNonSslPort, minimumTlsVersion).

configurableProperties.name: skuName
configurableProperties.description: Redis Cache pricing tier.

modules.name: User-Assigned Managed Identity
modules.description: Deploys a user-assigned managed identity for RBAC-based resource access.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: UTC timestamp for unique deployment names.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Azure region.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the managed identity.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Tags to apply.

modules.name: Virtual Network
modules.description: Deploys a VNet with configurable subnets, NSGs, and service endpoints.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: UTC timestamp for unique deployment names.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Azure region.

parameters.name: virtualNetworkSettings
parameters.description: VNet config (name, addressPrefixes, subnets with delegations and service endpoints).

configurableProperties.name: vnetAddressPrefix
configurableProperties.description: Address space CIDR for the virtual network.

modules.name: Network Security Group
modules.description: Deploys an NSG with configurable inbound/outbound security rules.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: UTC timestamp for unique deployment names.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Azure region.

parameters.name: nsgSettings
parameters.description: NSG config (name, securityRules with priority, access, direction, protocol, addresses).

modules.name: Private Endpoint
modules.description: Deploys a Private Endpoint for secure PaaS connectivity over VNet.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: UTC timestamp for unique deployment names.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Azure region.

parameters.name: privateEndpointSettings
parameters.description: PE config (name, subnetResourceId, serviceResourceId, groupId, privateDnsZoneGroup).

modules.name: RBAC Role Assignments
modules.description: Assigns RBAC roles on Storage Accounts, Service Bus, APIM, Key Vault, Cosmos DB, and more.

parameters.name: RBACSettings
parameters.description: RBAC settings with per-resource role assignments.

modules.name: Nodinite RBAC Assignments
modules.description: Assigns RBAC roles specifically for Nodinite logging components.

parameters.name: NodiniteRBACSettings
parameters.description: RBAC settings for Nodinite resources.

modules.name: API (APIM)
modules.description: Deploys a complete APIM API with version set, product link, backends, named values, and operations.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: UTC timestamp for unique deployment names.

parameters.name: environmentSuffix
parameters.description: Environment identifier (dev/test/prod).

parameters.name: api
parameters.description: Full API definition (name, displayName, operations, namedValues, etc.).

parameters.name: apiManagement
parameters.description: Reference to existing APIM instance (name, resourceGroupName).

modules.name: API Operations
modules.description: Deploys individual API operations on an existing APIM API.

parameters.name: dateTime
parameters.description: UTC timestamp for unique deployment names.

parameters.name: operation
parameters.description: Operation definition (name, displayName, method, urlTemplate, policies).

parameters.name: apiManagement
parameters.description: Reference to existing APIM instance and API.

subModules.description: Applies app settings to an existing Logic App.

subModules.description: Deploys API connections for a Logic App.

subModules.name: Function App - App Settings
subModules.description: Applies app settings to an existing Function App.

subModules.description: Creates an Azure Blob Storage linked service in Data Factory.

subModules.description: Creates a custom connector in Data Factory.
